method: Playwright using local Google Chrome against local v022 preview mobile viewport.
flowUnderTest: v022 homepage mobile preview -> verify requested copy/CTA state, selector hit target, and no nav overlap.

state.title: Noah Lucas — Product Executive
principles: Robotics and autonomy are proven in field conditions, not demos.
Mapping, simulation, and edge data matter when they change mission decisions.
Marketplaces scale through reliability, incentives, and daily operations.
Developer platforms win when integrations become repeatable.
Financial data products are only useful when they are reviewable and trusted.
